title: Better Free AI Image than Midjourney?
summary: Jack Roberts argues that Ideogram 4.0 solves the long-standing problem of text rendering in AI-generated images, outperforming Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro on DesignArena benchmarks while offering a free tier. He positions it as viable for brand asset generation tasks.
writeup: Jack Roberts examines Ideogram 4.0, presenting it as a fix for the persistent weakness of text rendering in AI-generated images. The case rests on DesignArena benchmarks, where Ideogram 4.0 is shown outperforming Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro, with the added point that it includes a free tier. Roberts frames the model as practical for brand asset generation.
